ItacPersonItem.Notes: He received a doctorate in law and theology, joined the Umoristi Academy in 1624, and taught Greek language at La Sapienza University. In Pisa, he joined the Disuniti Academy with the nickname `Spento`, and delivered orations on political and moral subjects. See his biography by Giampiero Brunelli in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
